detail.description: Kameron Misner flies out to right fielder Gabriel Rincones Jr. Tyler Tolbert to 3rd.
Kameron Misner pops out to third baseman Alec Bohm.
Kameron Misner flies out to right fielder Victor Mesa Jr.
Kameron Misner pops out to shortstop Taylor Walls.
Kameron Misner reaches on a fielder's choice. Jac Caglianone to 2nd. Jac Caglianone advances to 2nd, on a fielding error by second baseman Richie Palacios.
Kameron Misner out on a sacrifice bunt, pitcher Riley O'Brien to first baseman Alec Burleson. Michael Massey to 3rd. Lane Thomas to 2nd.
Kameron Misner flies out to center fielder Nathan Church.
Kameron Misner flies out to left fielder Lars Nootbaar.
Kameron Misner singles on a fly ball to left fielder Lars Nootbaar.
Kameron Misner singles on a soft ground ball to second baseman Brice Matthews, deflected by pitcher Spencer Arrighetti.
Kameron Misner singles on a line drive to left fielder Joey Loperfido.
Kameron Misner flies out to left fielder Brice Matthews.
Kameron Misner pops out to third baseman Isaac Paredes in foul territory.
Kameron Misner singles on a ground ball to shortstop Jeremy Peña.
Kameron Misner flies out to center fielder Taylor Trammell.
Kameron Misner singles on a line drive to center fielder Taylor Trammell.
Kameron Misner singles on a fly ball to center fielder Taylor Trammell. Salvador Perez scores. Michael Massey scores.
Kameron Misner singles on a line drive to right fielder Ezequiel Duran. Jac Caglianone scores.
Kameron Misner grounds into a force out, second baseman Ben Williamson to shortstop Taylor Walls. Michael Massey to 3rd. Isaac Collins out at 2nd. Kameron Misner to 1st.
Kameron Misner doubles (1) on a line drive to right fielder Jonny DeLuca. Carter Jensen scores. Tyler Tolbert to 3rd.
Kameron Misner grounds out, first baseman Jonathan Aranda to pitcher Steven Matz.
Kameron Misner singles on a line drive to right fielder Braden Montgomery.
Kameron Misner grounds out, second baseman Chase Meidroth to first baseman Jacob Gonzalez.
Kameron Misner flies out to right fielder Braden Montgomery. Isaac Collins to 3rd.
Kameron Misner flies out to center fielder Jacob Young.
